name: Held the horse, lost your dignity

props.ChoiceTitle: Held the horse, lost your dignity
props.ChoiceText: Your knight drank too deeply before a public ride, and you were left holding the reins, the vomit bucket, and everyone's laughter.
props.ChoiceBio: Holding the horse taught you how closely noble dignity can resemble stagecraft.

0.TransitionText: Because holding the horse taught you how closely noble dignity can resemble stagecraft, you became more useful in the very world that had humbled you.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Squire, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because holding the horse taught you how closely noble dignity can resemble stagecraft, humiliation hardened into discipline and service gave way to the infantry.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Infantry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because holding the horse taught you how closely noble dignity can resemble stagecraft, paid soldiering began to seem more honest than serving for someone else's dignity.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.
